args:
set -e
workspace_root="${STARCOIN_MCP_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-.}"
node_manifest="${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_MANIFEST:-$workspace_root/starcoin-node-mcp/crates/starcoin-node-mcp-server/Cargo.toml}"
node_bin="${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_BIN:-}"
if [ -z "$node_bin" ]; then
  node_bin="$(command -v starcoin-node-mcp 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi
if [ -n "$node_bin" ]; then
  if [ -n "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG:-}" ]; then
    exec "$node_bin" --config "$STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG"
  fi
  exec "$node_bin"
fi
if [ -n "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG:-}" ]; then
  exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$node_manifest" --bin starcoin-node-mcp -- --config "$STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG"
fi
exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$node_manifest" --bin starcoin-node-mcp

set -e
workspace_root="${STARCOIN_MCP_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-.}"
starmask_manifest="${STARMASK_MCP_MANIFEST:-$workspace_root/starmask-mcp/crates/starmask-mcp/Cargo.toml}"
starmask_bin="${STARMASK_MCP_BIN:-}"
runtime_dir="${STARMASK_WALLET_RUNTIME_DIR:-$HOME/.runtime/wallet-runtime}"
runtime_metadata="$runtime_dir/wallet-runtime.json"
daemon_socket_path="${STARMASK_MCP_DAEMON_SOCKET_PATH:-}"
if [ -z "$daemon_socket_path" ] && [ -f "$runtime_metadata" ]; then
  daemon_socket_path="$(python3 -c 'import json, sys; from pathlib import Path; data = json.loads(Path(sys.argv[1]).read_text()); print(data.get("daemon_socket_path", ""))' "$runtime_metadata" 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi
if [ -z "$starmask_bin" ]; then
  starmask_bin="$(command -v starmask-mcp 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi
if [ -n "$starmask_bin" ]; then
  if [ -n "$daemon_socket_path" ]; then
    exec "$starmask_bin" --daemon-socket-path "$daemon_socket_path"
  fi
  exec "$starmask_bin"
fi
if [ -n "$daemon_socket_path" ]; then
  exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$starmask_manifest" --bin starmask-mcp -- --daemon-socket-path "$daemon_socket_path"
fi
exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$starmask_manifest" --bin starmask-mcp
